data.title: As a developer maintaining DSO, all installation documentation lives at the project root and all internal references point to root INSTALL.md with no stale links to the old plugin-directory INSTALL
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Remove plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md from the repository and update all internal references -- code, scripts, tests, and docs -- to point to root INSTALL.md.
**Why**: Two competing INSTALL files create confusion: agents and users find the old one first (it is in the plugin directory that skills load from), follow its outdated git-clone instructions, and fail. Consolidation eliminates the competing document.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md to reference root INSTALL.md (MUST happen before deletion); delete plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md; clean up .test-index entries; update dso-setup.sh post-setup output; update test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh; update all other internal references
- OUT: Writing root INSTALL.md content (Story C); updating CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (Story E)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md is updated to reference root INSTALL.md instead of plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md -- this update is committed before the deletion commit
  <- Satisfies: SC6 (CLAUDE.md must be updated before deletion to avoid referential integrity gate failure)
- When this story is complete, plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md has been removed from the repository
  <- Satisfies: SC6
- When this story is complete, .test-index has no stale entries mapping to the removed file (entries for plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md are either removed or remapped to root INSTALL.md based on whether test-reinstall-hooks*.sh tests validate content that moves to root)
  <- Satisfies: SC6
- When this story is complete, dso-setup.sh post-setup output directs users to root INSTALL.md instead of docs/INSTALL.md
  <- Satisfies: adversarial review finding -- runtime echo statement in dso-setup.sh hardcodes old path
- When this story is complete, test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh has been updated to validate root INSTALL.md instead of the old plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md path
  <- Satisfies: adversarial review finding -- test hardcodes old path; breaks CI after deletion
- When this story is complete, all other internal references to plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md have been updated to point to root INSTALL.md
  <- Satisfies: SC6

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] CLAUDE.md must be updated BEFORE deleting plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md -- check-referential-integrity.sh pre-commit gate will block all commits if deletion happens first
- [Testing] .test-index cleanup decision: determine whether the entry for plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md should be deleted or remapped to root INSTALL.md, based on whether test-reinstall-hooks*.sh tests validate content that moves to root INSTALL.md (remap) or content specific to the old plugin-directory file (delete)
- [Testing] .test-index cleanup must not break the test gate -- verify no stale entries remain after removal
- [Reliability] Hard coordination dependency on external ticket 9b59-bac7 (plugin boundary allowlist update) -- Story F cannot complete until 9b59-bac7 closes

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue -- one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
